summary.nextObjective: Connect Academy Trial to the Home Roadmap

nextBuild.title: Home Roadmap Integration
nextBuild.objective: Make the Home Roadmap the primary post-onboarding journey and place Academy Trial within it.
nextBuild.whyNow: The revised onboarding is approved; the dashboard and Home journey must now reflect the same product decisions.
definitionOfDone: Onboarding exits through the approved welcome and Begin Trial splash
Home Roadmap is the primary journey
Academy Trial is represented within the Roadmap
Lab remains at the bottom of Home
Flow is validated on a real iPhone

decisions.title: Roadmap remains primary
decisions.detail: Keep the original Roadmap concept as the main Academy journey on Home.

decisions.title: Academy Trial placement
decisions.detail: Move the Academy Trial experience into the Roadmap rather than adding more onboarding slides.

decisions.title: Lab placement
decisions.detail: Keep the Lab at the bottom of the Home screen.

decisions.title: Semantic status updates
decisions.detail: The dashboard automatically reloads this shared state, while product meaning is updated with each approved change.

academyJourney.name: Step 1 — Name
academyJourney.subtitle: Player name entered on the jersey.

academyJourney.name: Step 2 — Number
academyJourney.subtitle: Jersey number selection with name retained.

academyJourney.name: Welcome + Begin Trial
academyJourney.subtitle: Consolidated splash after identity and position setup.
academyJourney.review: This replaces additional Academy Trial onboarding slides.

academyJourney.name: Home Roadmap
academyJourney.subtitle: Primary post-onboarding Academy journey.
academyJourney.review: The Roadmap, not extra onboarding slides, should carry the Academy journey.

academyJourney.name: Academy Trial
academyJourney.subtitle: Baseline Football IQ assessment launched from the Roadmap.

academyJourney.name: Lab
academyJourney.subtitle: Experimental training area at the bottom of Home.
academyJourney.review: Do not move the Lab into onboarding or above the Roadmap.
